data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery state lifecycle requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a delivery state lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not include any delivery rows or related data to confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for tracking delivery states, yet no concrete evidence is available to demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation process is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No delivery rows or related data provided to confirm the requirement of one delivery row per (event, subscription, channel).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
